title: Figure 3 from: Abuhaliema A, Gharaibeh L, Jaradat E, Hammad M, Alshaer W (2026) Non-coding RNAs in gene therapy: mechanisms, delivery strategies, and clinical translation. Pharmacia 73: 1-25. https://doi.org/10.3897/pharmacia.73.e173259
author: Abuhaliema, Ali

description: Figure 3 Disease-specific ncRNA therapeutic strategies and delivery approaches. Integrated framework linking disease context (colon cancer, brain disorders, and cardiac disease) with dysregulated ncRNAs, therapeutic modulation strategies, delivery vehicles, and resulting clinical outcomes.
